Test Case Name: TC01_Verify Value Proposition Display Up to $300MM_Construction_New Business_AC1
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that the value proposition displays the updated range of Up to $300MM for Middle Market construction vertical on the quote document
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission with Construction vertical
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully and proceed to line selection

Action: 3. Fill all mandatory fields for Construction vertical
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to fill all required fields without errors

Action: 4. Navigate to Price screen
Expected Result: 4. User should be able to navigate to the Price screen successfully

Action: 5. Click Price
Expected Result: 5. Underwriter rules should be displayed for approval

Action: 6. Approve Underwriter rules
Expected Result: 6. Rules should be approved successfully

Action: 7. Navigate to Quote screen
Expected Result: 7. User should be able to navigate to the Quote screen

Action: 8. Click Quote
Expected Result: 8. Quote document should be generated successfully

Action: 9. Verify value proposition text on quote document
Expected Result: 9. User should see the value proposition displaying ""Up to $300MM"" for Middle Market construction vertical on the quote document

Action: 10. Validate the placement of value proposition on quote
Expected Result: 10. Value proposition should be displayed in the correct location on the quote document
